pattern: Use className with Tailwind not inline styles
anti_pattern: <View style={{ backgroundColor: '#fff' padding: 16 borderRadius: 12 }}>
notes: NativeWind compiles className to StyleSheet at build time for performance

implementation: colors: { apple: { blue: '#007AFF' red: '#FF3B30' green: '#34C759' gray: '#8E8E93' } }
anti_pattern: Hardcoded hex colors in className or style
notes: Semantic tokens enable dark mode and consistency across the app

anti_pattern: Manual colorScheme checks for every element
notes: NativeWind dark: prefix reads system color scheme automatically

anti_pattern: Arbitrary spacing values outside the 4pt grid
notes: Apple's 4pt grid aligns all UI elements to a consistent rhythm

implementation: fontFamily: { sans: ['SF Pro Display' 'SF Pro Text' 'Inter' 'system-ui'] }
anti_pattern: No font config — defaults to generic sans-serif
notes: SF Pro on iOS automatic via system-ui; Inter as cross-platform fallback

anti_pattern: <Pressable className="rounded-sm"> or arbitrary rounded-[5px]
notes: rounded-xl = 12px matches Apple button corner standard; rounded-2xl = 16px for cards

pattern: borderCurve continuous via style prop alongside className
anti_pattern: className="rounded-2xl" alone without borderCurve style
notes: NativeWind cannot express borderCurve — must use style prop alongside className

anti_pattern: <Pressable className="h-8 w-8"> for small icon buttons
notes: Apple HIG requires 44x44pt minimum tappable area for all interactive elements

implementation: <SafeAreaView className="flex-1"> or useSafeAreaInsets() for manual control
anti_pattern: <View className="pt-12"> hardcoded status bar padding
notes: useSafeAreaInsets adapts to Dynamic Island notch and home indicator automatically

anti_pattern: <TouchableOpacity activeOpacity={0.8}>
notes: Pressable gives full control over pressed state styling via className selectors

implementation: import * as Haptics from 'expo-haptics'; onPress={() => { Haptics.impactAsync(ImpactFeedbackStyle.Medium); action(); }}
anti_pattern: onPress without haptic feedback on interactive elements
notes: Haptics match iOS tap feedback patterns and improve perceived responsiveness

anti_pattern: <View className="opacity-80 bg-white"> for blur/frosted glass effects
notes: BlurView uses native UIVisualEffectView on iOS for true vibrancy

implementation: import { Image } from 'expo-image'; <Image source={uri} placeholder={blurhash} className="w-full h-48 rounded-xl">
anti_pattern: import { Image } from 'react-native'; without blurhash or caching policy
notes: expo-image handles blurhash placeholders caching and progressive loading

pattern: expo-symbols for SF Symbols on iOS
implementation: import { SFSymbol } from 'expo-symbols'; <SFSymbol name="star.fill" weight="semibold" size={24} />
anti_pattern: Custom icon fonts or PNG assets for system icons
notes: SF Symbols adapt to weight and scale matching iOS native components

implementation: withSpring(toValue { damping: 15 stiffness: 150 }) on shared values
anti_pattern: Animated.timing() with easeInOut or CSS transition equivalents
notes: Spring physics match UIKit's default animation feel without frame drops

anti_pattern: <ScrollView>{items.map(i => <Item key={i.id} />)}</ScrollView> for large lists
notes: FlashList recycles cells for O(1) memory regardless of list length

implementation: Platform.select({ ios: { shadowColor: '#000' shadowOpacity: 0.1 shadowRadius: 8 } android: { elevation: 4 } })
anti_pattern: Single style object applied to all platforms without Platform.select
notes: iOS shadow props are ignored on Android; elevation is ignored on iOS

implementation: const colorScheme = useColorScheme(); const isDark = colorScheme === 'dark';
anti_pattern: Hardcoded light-mode colors without system theme detection
notes: NativeWind dark: prefix handles most cases but useColorScheme needed for dynamic values

anti_pattern: import { StatusBar } from 'react-native'; with hardcoded barStyle
notes: style="auto" adapts to light/dark mode automatically on both platforms

pattern: KeyboardAvoidingView with behavior padding on iOS
anti_pattern: No KeyboardAvoidingView causing keyboard to cover inputs
notes: behavior="padding" shifts content up on iOS matching native keyboard handling

pattern: Modal presentationStyle formSheet for Apple sheets
anti_pattern: Custom bottom-sheet built from scratch with Animated.Value
notes: formSheet uses native UISheetPresentationController with detent support on iOS 16+

anti_pattern: <Text allowFontScaling={false}> or style={{ fontSize: 16 }} fixed size
notes: Dynamic Type respects user accessibility text size preferences in Settings

pattern: Destructure hook returns for React Compiler
implementation: const { data isLoading error } = useMyHook(); const [count setCount] = useState(0);
anti_pattern: const result = useMyHook(); result.data — accessing via dot notation
notes: React Compiler requires destructured bindings to track dependencies correctly

pattern: gap instead of margin for element spacing
anti_pattern: <View><Item style={{ marginBottom: 16 }} /></View> on each child
notes: gap is a flexbox property applied to the parent; cleaner than per-child margins

anti_pattern: <TextInput value={text} onChangeText={setText} /> causing re-render on every keystroke
notes: Uncontrolled inputs avoid React re-renders per keystroke improving list scroll performance
